_doc: Novelty (non-isometry) certificate: parameters of the hypothesized family 'n_axes axis lines + n_blocks whole W4 cells on a block design over n_points points' which contains the known modular 420 (12 axes + 51 whole cells, 12 + 8*51 = 420). scripts/verify_novelty.py recomputes the witness |dot| histogram from certs/config420.json and proves BY EXACT COUNTING that no member of this family realizes it. All formula constants are re-derived from explicit cell computations, never assumed.
